title: Assemblyman Tri Ta Introduces Bill to Correct Racial Targeting
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Manicurists in California have not been included in exemptions that allow other beauty industry licensees to be classified as independent contractors.
A report by the UCLA Labor Center states that 82% of nail salon workers in California were born in Vietnam.
85% of nail salon workers in California are female.
